provenance.method: manual synthesis from validation and shift records

content.first_line: The pause is not the opposite of presence. The pause is presence held in reserve.

historical_correlation.description: Fragment 87 language matches cadence softening signatures preceding recorded pause clusters.
historical_correlation.observed_behavior: Lexical tapering and breath-lengthening cues surface minutes before pause commits.

content.detection_latency_improvement: ~14 minutes early detection relative to baseline pause alerts
content.semantic_analysis: The fragment frames pause as active containment, mirroring the intentional deceleration observed before shift commits. Its syntax mirrors pre-pause cadence drops, making it a reliable harbinger of impending pauses.
usage_guidelines: Deploy as an early-warning feature when cadence markers begin tapering.
Elevate alert thresholds if paired with breath-length variance increases within the 6-18 minute lag window.
Cross-check with F170000 pattern shift features to reduce false positives in low-signal periods.
